intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Before we begin, tell me...

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: What is your name, dreamer?

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: {playerName}... I will remember that name.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: In the beginning, there was only darkness.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: The Ancient Shadows ruled everything. No light. No dreams. Only void.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Then I came.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: I fought them. Alone. For eras.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: And I won. I sealed them in the deepest place of existence: the Abyss.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: I built this world from nothing. I created seven guardians to protect it.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: For centuries, there was peace.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: But the shadows returned.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: One of my guardians... my first... my brightest...

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: He freed them.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Hikari became Kurayami. Light became darkness.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: He put the other guardians to sleep. The realms went dark.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: I gave everything I had to seal the shadows long ago. I cannot fight like I once did.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: That is why I need you, {playerName}.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Your mind is bright. You still train. You still grow.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: If you can awaken the guardians... if you can unite their lights...

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: We can seal the shadows once more.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: And maybe... maybe save the one who freed them.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Will you help me, {playerName}?

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Thank you.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Your journey begins in the Realm of Ice, where Fubuki sleeps.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Each correct answer brings light. Each mistake lets the Nightmares closer.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Fill the light bar to complete each stage. Complete all ten stages, and the guardian will awaken.

intro.speaker: Yumemori
intro.text: Go now, {playerName}. I believe in you.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: This is the Realm of Ice, home of Fubuki, the guardian of frost.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: She was the first to fall when Kurayami attacked. Brave, but overwhelmed.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: Fubuki sleeps beneath the frozen lake. Only your light can reach her.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: The challenges here will test your ability to add and subtract quickly.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: Are you ready, {playerName}?

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Welcome to the Psychic Realm, home of Omoi, the guardian of thought.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Omoi sees what others cannot. He felt something was wrong with Hikari long before the rest of us.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: But seeing is not the same as stopping. He carries that weight still.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: The numbers here will grow larger. But your mind is ready, {playerName}.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Add and subtract with focus. Light the way to Omoi.

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: This is the Jungle Realm, where Midori tends to growth.

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: Midori believes that anything can grow. Anything can heal. Anyone can change.

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: Here, you will learn to multiply, {playerName}. Numbers will grow, just like the forest.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: The Cosmos Realm stretches across the stars. Uchū watches over infinity.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: Uchū understands loneliness. The space between stars is vast and empty.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: Perhaps that is why he does not judge Hikari as harshly as others.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: Here, you will learn to divide, {playerName}. To break the large into the small.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: The universe is vast, but your mind can contain it.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: The Volcano Realm burns with intensity. Kaen thrives in the heat.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Kaen is... angry. He sees Hikari's actions as betrayal. As weakness.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Forgiveness does not come easy to fire.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Here, multiplication and division combine. The challenges will be fierce.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: But fire also brings strength. Let Kaen's spirit fuel you, {playerName}.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: The Ocean Realm is the deepest part of the Dream World. Nami flows through all.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: Nami is calm. Peaceful. She remembers Hikari as he was, not as he is.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: Here, all your training comes together, {playerName}. Every operation you have learned.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: This is your final test before the Abyss.

7.speaker: Yumemori
7.text: Long ago, I pushed the Ancient Shadows here. I sealed them with my own light.

7.speaker: Yumemori
7.text: And then Hikari broke the seal.

7.speaker: Yumemori
7.text: Be strong. Be bright. We are all with you, {playerName}.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: This is it, {playerName}. Fubuki is almost awake.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: But the Nightmares are fighting hard. They do not want to lose this realm.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: The bar will drain faster. You will start with less light.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: Stay calm. Stay focused. You can do this.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Omoi stirs in the mist. One final push, {playerName}.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: The Nightmares will fight harder than ever. But so will you.

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: The jungle trembles. Midori is close to waking.

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: Show the Nightmares the power of growth, {playerName}.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: The stars are aligning. Uchū reaches out from the void.

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: One final challenge among the stars, {playerName}.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: The volcano rumbles. Kaen's fire wants to break free.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Channel the flames, {playerName}. Let your mind burn bright.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: The ocean stirs. The final guardian awaits.

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: Everything you have learned leads to this moment, {playerName}.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: Six guardians. One dreamer. Against the king of Nightmares.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: Yumemori. Old fool. You really think this child can do what you could not?

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: And I broke the seal. What you built, I destroyed.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: You gave everything to create us. And I used your gift to undo your work.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: Do you know why I did this?

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: Because you never told me the darkness would call so loudly.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: You never told me the forgetting would hurt so much.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: You just expected me to shine. Forever. Without help.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: Well, I am done shining for those who do not remember.

7.speaker: Kurayami
7.text: If I cannot be light... NO ONE WILL.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: {playerName}, you did it!

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: I... I am awake.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: How long was I sleeping? It felt like forever.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: Thank you, {playerName}. The Nightmares kept me frozen for so long.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: I tried to stop him, you know. Hikari. When he went to the Abyss.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: I was not strong enough.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: But now I will help you. When the darkness feels too strong, call on me.

1.speaker: Fubuki
1.text: I can freeze the Nightmares in their tracks. Your light will have time to grow.

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: Fubuki's power is now yours. Use it wisely, {playerName}.

1.speaker: system
1.text: New Power Unlocked: Freeze — Stops bar drain for 5 seconds

1.speaker: Yumemori
1.text: Five realms remain. The Psychic Realm awaits.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: The Nightmares blinded me with doubt. But your light cut through, {playerName}.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: I knew. I knew something was wrong with Hikari.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: I saw the emptiness growing inside him. I saw the shadows whispering.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: But I said nothing. I thought... I thought he would find his way back.

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Omoi... it was not your fault.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: Maybe. Maybe not. But I can help now.

2.speaker: Omoi
2.text: I offer you my gift: Insight. When a problem seems too hard, I will show you the way.

2.speaker: system
2.text: New Power Unlocked: Insight — Reveals first half of answer

2.speaker: Yumemori
2.text: Two guardians stand with you now. The Jungle Realm calls.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: The Nightmares wanted everything to wither. But you brought growth, {playerName}.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: Do you know what I remember most about Hikari?

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: He used to help me plant seeds. He would shine on them and they would grow so fast.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: He was warm. Kind. Full of light.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: That Hikari is still there. Somewhere. Like a seed buried deep.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: Even the darkest soil can grow something beautiful.

3.speaker: Midori
3.text: Take my gift: Restore. When your light fades, I will help it bloom again.

3.speaker: system
3.text: New Power Unlocked: Restore — Recovers 20% of sleep bar

3.speaker: Yumemori
3.text: Three guardians awake. The Cosmos awaits.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: I have traveled the cosmos alone while sleeping. But you called me back, {playerName}.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: The others are angry at Hikari. Or sad. Or guilty.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: I understand the void. I have stared into it for eons.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: When you are surrounded by emptiness long enough... it starts to whisper.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: Hikari heard the whispers. And he was not strong enough to ignore them.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: That does not make him evil. It makes him lost.

4.speaker: Uchū
4.text: My gift: Cosmic Solve. When the weight of the universe feels too heavy, I will carry one problem for you.

4.speaker: system
4.text: New Power Unlocked: Cosmic Solve — Auto-completes one problem correctly

4.speaker: Yumemori
4.text: Four guardians shine. The Volcano rumbles.

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: FINALLY!

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: I was burning with frustration in that darkness. Now I burn with PURPOSE!

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: You want to know what I think about Hikari?

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: He was a COWARD.

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: We all felt the forgetting. We all felt weaker. But we did not betray our family.

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: He opened the Abyss. He let the shadows free. He put us all to sleep.

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: Because he could not handle being forgotten.

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Kaen...

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: I know, I know. 'He is still our brother.' 'He can be saved.'

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: Maybe. Maybe not. But if he stands in our way, I will burn through him.

5.speaker: Kaen
5.text: My gift to you, {playerName}: Blaze Skip. Some problems are not worth the fight. Skip them. Move on. Win.

5.speaker: system
5.text: New Power Unlocked: Blaze Skip — Skip problem without penalty

5.speaker: Yumemori
5.text: Five guardians blaze. One remains. The Ocean calls.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: The currents are calm again. You have brought balance, {playerName}.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: I am the youngest guardian. Hikari used to watch over me.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: He taught me how to flow. How to stay calm when the waters got rough.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: I remember his light. It was warm. Like sunlight on water.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: The others talk about saving him or stopping him.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: I just want to see him again. The real him.

6.speaker: Nami
6.text: My gift: Simplify. When the waters are too rough, I will smooth them for you.

6.speaker: system
6.text: New Power Unlocked: Simplify — Reduces problem to easier numbers

6.speaker: Yumemori
6.text: All six guardians stand with you now, {playerName}.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: Six guardians. Six lights. Together again.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: Long ago, I sealed the Ancient Shadows alone. It took everything I had.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: But this time... we are not alone.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: This will be the hardest challenge you have faced, {playerName}. The Nightmares will fight with everything they have.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: And Kurayami... he was the strongest of us. Even now, filled with darkness, his power is immense.

gathering.speaker: Uchū
gathering.text: We stand across infinity with you.

gathering.speaker: Yumemori
gathering.text: I could not save him alone. I could not seal the shadows again alone.

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: Foolish dreamer. Do you think your little light can reach me?

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: I was the first. The brightest. The leader.

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: Yumemori made me from his purest light. I was his pride.

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: And then the dreamers forgot me.

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: Do you know what that feels like? To fade? To become nothing?

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: The shadows offered me a choice. Fade away forgotten... or become something they would never forget.

abyssMidpoint.speaker: Kurayami
abyssMidpoint.text: Soon, you will choose too, {playerName}. Keep shining... or let the darkness in.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: Hikari...

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: You... you remembered.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: You still call me that name.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: After everything I did... you still...

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: You are my son. My first creation. My brightest light.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: I never stopped remembering you. I never stopped hoping.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: I... I let the shadows in too deep. They are part of me now.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: I cannot come back. Not yet. Maybe not ever.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: But...

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: You did not give up, {playerName}. Even when the darkness was everywhere.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: Maybe... maybe there is hope.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kurayami
finalBattleVictory.text: Maybe... in another dream.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: He is gone.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: But not destroyed.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: Somewhere, in the deepest part of the Abyss... a part of him remains.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Fubuki
finalBattleVictory.text: The darkness is lifting.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Omoi
finalBattleVictory.text: I can see the light again.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Midori
finalBattleVictory.text: He called you Father. He still remembers who he was.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Uchū
finalBattleVictory.text: The void is not forever. Even stars are reborn.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Kaen
finalBattleVictory.text: ...I do not forgive him. Not yet. But maybe... someday.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Nami
finalBattleVictory.text: He said 'maybe.' That is enough for now.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: The Ancient Shadows are sealed once more. The Dream World is safe.

finalBattleVictory.speaker: Yumemori
finalBattleVictory.text: Because of you, {playerName}.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: All six realms shine bright. All six guardians stand with you.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: And the seal is whole again.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: Long ago, I built this world from nothing. I fought the darkness alone.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: I thought I had to protect everyone by myself.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: You showed me that light grows stronger when it is shared.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: The Nightmares will return someday. They always do.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: But as long as we keep dreaming, as long as we keep shining...

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: You are Sokunō now, {playerName}. The Fast Brain. The Dreamer who saved the Dream World.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: Return every night. Keep your light bright. Keep your mind sharp.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: Hikari will find his way home.

finale.speaker: Yumemori
finale.text: I will be here, Hikari. When you find your way back.
